'''âzh-v-th''' ('''kazhavath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoohoo|yoohoo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoohoo|yoohoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-v-th
|-
! Lemma
| kazhavath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhavath|thizhavath]] || [[word:jizhavath|jizhavath]] || [[word:shizhavath|shizhavath]] || [[word:kizhavath|kizhavath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhavath|thuthuzhavath]] || [[word:jujuzhavath|jujuzhavath]] || [[word:shushuzhavath|shushuzhavath]] || [[word:kukuzhavath|kukuzhavath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhavath|thuzhavath]] || [[word:juzhavath|juzhavath]] || [[word:shuzhavath|shuzhavath]] || [[word:kuzhavath|kuzhavath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhavath|thuzhavath]] || [[word:juzhavath|juzhavath]] || [[word:shuzhavath|shuzhavath]] || [[word:kuzhavath|kuzhavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhavath|thezhavath]] || [[word:jezhavath|jezhavath]] || [[word:shezhavath|shezhavath]] || [[word:kezhavath|kezhavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhavath|thothozhavath]] || [[word:jojozhavath|jojozhavath]] || [[word:shoshozhavath|shoshozhavath]] || [[word:kokozhavath|kokozhavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhavath|thozhavath]] || [[word:jozhavath|jozhavath]] || [[word:shozhavath|shozhavath]] || [[word:kozhavath|kozhavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhavath|thozhavath]] || [[word:jozhavath|jozhavath]] || [[word:shozhavath|shozhavath]] || [[word:kozhavath|kozhavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhavath|thĂŠzhavath]] || [[word:jĂŠzhavath|jĂŠzhavath]] || [[word:shĂŠzhavath|shĂŠzhavath]] || [[word:kĂŠzhavath|kĂŠzhavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhavath|thathazhavath]] || [[word:jajazhavath|jajazhavath]] || [[word:shashazhavath|shashazhavath]] || [[word:kakazhavath|kakazhavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhavath|thazhavath]] || [[word:jazhavath|jazhavath]] || [[word:shazhavath|shazhavath]] || [[word:kazhavath|kazhavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhavath|thazhavath]] || [[word:jazhavath|jazhavath]] || [[word:shazhavath|shazhavath]] || [[word:kazhavath|kazhavath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhavath|shazhavath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhavath|goshazhavath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhavath|gokishazhavath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhavathnĂŒ|shazhavathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhavathnknĂŒ|goshazhavathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhavathnĂŒ|gokishazhavathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhavathshĂ«|shazhavathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkshĂ«|goshazhavathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhavathshĂ«|gokishazhavathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhavathro|shazhavathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkro|goshazhavathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhavathro|gokishazhavathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhavathmu|shazhavathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkmu|goshazhavathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhavathmu|gokishazhavathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhavathsher|shazhavathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhavathnksher|goshazhavathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhavathsher|gokishazhavathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhavathng|shazhavathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkng|goshazhavathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhavathng|gokishazhavathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhavathya|shazhavathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkya|goshazhavathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhavathya|gokishazhavathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhavathyam|shazhavathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkyam|goshazhavathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhavathyam|gokishazhavathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhavathnĂŒshĂ«|shazhavathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhavathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhavathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhavathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhavathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhavathnĂŒro|shazhavathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhavathnknĂŒro|goshazhavathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhavathnĂŒro|gokishazhavathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhavathnĂŒmu|shazhavathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhavathnknĂŒmu|goshazhavathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhavathnĂŒmu|gokishazhavathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhavathshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhavathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhavathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhavathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhavathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhavathshĂ«ro|shazhavathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkshĂ«ro|goshazhavathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhavathshĂ«ro|gokishazhavathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhavathshĂ«mu|shazhavathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkshĂ«mu|goshazhavathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhavathshĂ«mu|gokishazhavathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhavathronĂŒ|shazhavathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkronĂŒ|goshazhavathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhavathronĂŒ|gokishazhavathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhavathroshĂ«|shazhavathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkroshĂ«|goshazhavathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhavathroshĂ«|gokishazhavathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhavathromu|shazhavathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkromu|goshazhavathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhavathromu|gokishazhavathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhavathmunĂŒ|shazhavathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkmunĂŒ|goshazhavathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhavathmunĂŒ|gokishazhavathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhavathmushĂ«|shazhavathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkmushĂ«|goshazhavathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhavathmushĂ«|gokishazhavathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhavathmuro|shazhavathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhavathnkmuro|goshazhavathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhavathmuro|gokishazhavathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
